name: instant-api — deploy failure rate > 30% (1h) faceted by team
description: Extends the A1 deploy-failure alert by faceting on team_id. A1's policy fires on aggregate failure rate; this one fires when a single team's deploys are >30% failing over a rolling 1h — surfacing per-customer breakage (bad Dockerfile, ENV mismatch, Kaniko cache poison) that's invisible at the aggregate. Source: deploy.created vs deploy.failed audit events emitted by api/internal/handlers/deploy.go.

nrql.query: SELECT filter(count(*), WHERE audit_kind = 'deploy.failed') / (filter(count(*), WHERE audit_kind = 'deploy.failed') + filter(count(*), WHERE audit_kind = 'deploy.healthy')) * 100 AS 'fail_pct' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind IN ('deploy.failed', 'deploy.healthy') FACET team_id
